# @swqt/ui-tokens

> AI / agent quick index. Prefer AGENTS.md for full rules.

## Package

- Name: `@swqt/ui-tokens`
- Entry CSS: `@swqt/ui-tokens/tokens.css` (also `@swqt/ui-tokens`)
- Role: design tokens only (no React)

## Must read

- AGENTS.md
- docs/TOKENS.md
- docs/ADOPTION.md
- MCP `swui://foundation/contract`
- MCP `swui://packages/ui/docs/HTML-STANDARDS.md`

## Blocking UI handoff

- Semantic tokens only; no raw colors or parallel token files
- Repository font stacks only; no external fonts
- `lucide-react` named imports only; no emoji or ad hoc SVG icons
- Controls come from `@swqt/ui`; native HTML first
- Actively consult `https://ui.swqt.net/colors`, `/typography`, `/icons`, and the exact component demo

## Sibling packages

- `@swqt/ui` — React primitives + ThemeProvider + WideScreenGate


## Theme contract

- global light/dark runtime is owned by @swqt/ui ThemeProvider
- `:root` + reserved `.dark` CSS both ship

## Install sketch

```css
@import "tailwindcss";
@import "@swqt/ui-tokens/tokens.css";
```
